title: DinoBrik's Copper
description: This pack enhances your Minecraft experience by adding a new progression tier with copper tools and armor. This pack aims to slow down the early game while keeping it engaging and fun!
body:
![DinoBrik's Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bebff3fb699bf5024384e37e6ed66abbb1651f0.png)

**Dinobrik's Copper Progression Datapack** enhances your Minecraft experience by adding a **new progression tier** with copper tools and armor. This pack is designed to **slow down the early game** without taking away the fun!

### Features
- **Stone pickaxes can no longer mine iron ore** — you’ll need a **copper pickaxe** to level up your mining game.
- **Smelting raw iron** in a furnace now yields only iron nuggets**, so while you’re saving up for a blast furnace, you’ll be rocking **durable copper armor**.
- As a unique bonus, **copper tools and armor items are immune to lightning strikes** when dropped, adding a touch of magical resilience to your gear.

Perfect for players who want a **challenging, immersive progression** experience in Minecraft!

**⚠️ Resourcepack Required**

[**Subscribe on YouTube for updates and more datapacks!**](https://www.youtube.com/@DinoBrikGaming?sub_confirmation=1)
